data.name: LUST CURSE 🔞
data.detailed_description:
LUST CURSE 🔞 is a thrilling third-person adventure that takes you deep into the mysteries of a tropical island bound by an ancient, seductive curse. You play as Lana Wett, a daring and seductive pirate who survives a devastating plane crash, only to find herself stranded in an unknown land filled with danger, temptation, and secrets waiting to be unraveled.

As Lana searches for her missing friend, she must navigate the perils of the island while resisting—or embracing—the dark forces that awaken her most primal desires. Every choice shapes her fate, testing not only her survival skills but also her self-control. Will she uncover the truth behind the curse, or succumb to its irresistible pull?

Key Features:

  • A Deep and Tense Storyline – Immerse yourself in Lana’s perilous journey, filled with intrigue, mysticism, and morally complex decisions that influence how the story unfolds.
  • A Beautiful yet Haunting Tropical World – Explore lush jungles, breathtaking beaches, and ancient ruins, where beauty and danger intertwine.
  • Freedom of Choice – Your decisions determine Lana’s path, relationships, and ultimate fate, offering multiple ways to experience the story.
  • Cinematic Cutscenes – High-quality, immersive cinematic storytelling with dynamic camera angles, realistic facial expressions, and lifelike character interactions.
  • Advanced Breast and Butt Physics – Cutting-edge soft-body dynamics bring Lana and other characters to life with fluid, natural movement.
  • UE5-Powered Graphics – Unreal Engine 5 delivers stunning visuals, realistic lighting, and immersive environmental details, making the island feel alive.
  • Steamy and Provocative Content – Experience a bold, erotic adventure where sensuality plays a crucial role in both the narrative and character interactions.

    Are you ready to embrace the mystery, danger, and temptation of LUST CURSE 🔞? The island is waiting… but will you be able to escape its grip?

data.short_description: LUST CURSE 🔞 is a thrilling third-person adventure where you play as Lana Wett, a seductive pirate stranded on a cursed tropical island. Unravel its dark secrets, resist or embrace the curse’s desires, and shape Lana’s fate in a world of danger, mystery, and temptation.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
